title: Senior Teacher - iDiscoveri Education - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - iDiscoveri Education - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Join the iDiscoveri Education family as a Senior Teacher in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iDiscoveri Education:
iDiscoveri Education is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iDiscoveri Education!
